0.text: Areas of infiltrative ground glass opacities along the peribronchial sheaths in both lungs

1.text: Traction bronchiectasis adjacent to the ground glass opacities

2.text: Thin intralobular septal thickening adjacent to the ground glass opacities

3.text: Consolidations with air bronchograms in the lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Consolidations with air bronchograms in the basal segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Focal centrilobular infiltrates in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung
